---
title: "National-Scale Water Resource Assessment Dashboard"
subtitle: "Google Earth Engine Web Application for Hydro-Climatic Monitoring"
date: "2025-10-01"
categories: [GeoAI, GEE, Cloud Compute, Hydrology]
---

### 1. The Challenge
[cite_start]Water resource planning in climate-stressed catchments requires processing massive spatial datasets[cite: 136, 157]. [cite_start]Non-technical government and industry stakeholders lack the tools to query complex, high-resolution remote sensing time-series data efficiently[cite: 148, 155].

### 2. The Solution
[cite_start]Developed a scalable web-based geospatial application using **Google Earth Engine** and the **AlphaEarth embedding dataset** for regional surface water change detection and watershed monitoring[cite: 153, 154].

```javascript
// Example code snippet embedded directly into your site
// Generating water index time-series
var collection = ee.ImageCollection('COPERNICUS/S2_SR')
  .filterBounds(roi)
  .filterDate('2025-01-01', '2026-01-01')
  .map(function(image) {
    var ndwi = image.normalizedDifference(['B3', 'B8']).rename('NDWI');
    return image.addBands(ndwi);
  });
